sigma_rules.title: CDB Sentinel APEX - SimpleHelp_RMM_flaw_could_give_attackers_full_access_to_mana

sigma_rules.author: CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0

sigma_rules.title: CDB Sentinel APEX - CVE202612328__Memory_safety_bugs_fixed_in_Firefox_ESR_11537

sigma_rules.title: CDB Sentinel APEX - CVE202612327__Memory_safety_bugs_fixed_in_Firefox_ESR_14012

sigma_rules.title: CDB Sentinel APEX - CVE202612326__Memory_safety_bugs_fixed_in_Firefox_152_and_Th

yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_June_2026_Patch_Tuesday_Microsoft_Patche {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for June 2026 Patch Tuesday: Microsoft Patches 206 Vulnerabilities Including Three P"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-06-16"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: SimpleHelp RMM flaw could give attackers full access to mana"; content:"CVE-2026-48558"; nocase; sid:5727367; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
